title: jasminum macrocarpum
intro: Jasminum macrocarpum, also known as the Indian jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Jasminum macrocarpum include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and scented products.
